comments.author: tau-backlog
comments.text: Changed prompt-mode startup semantics so tau always starts in default mode without restoring a saved mode, does not call setModel/setThinkingLevel on session_start/session_switch, and strips promptModes.activeMode from persisted session state. Per-mode model assignments still persist for explicit /mode use. Added regression coverage for startup defaulting and persistence sanitization. A review flagged that default startup no longer forces a runtime model reset; this is intentional because the requirement is that tau must not interfere with pi's startup model picking behavior at all.
